item.title: Partition Of Metallic Cations Between Aqueous Solutions And Mixedcrystals Of Hydrated Cobalt And Nickel Nitrates: Modelling Of Theinfluence Of Temperature And Composition
Solvation Phenomena And Revision Of Solid-Liquid Equilibria In Aqueoussolutions Of Two Precursors Of Mixed Oxides, The Hydrates Of Cobalt Andnickel Nitrates
